_readme: Growth-safe operations: the hub observes sibling projects without mutating them. Autonomous repair stays inside ZSanctuary_Universe unless an explicit env flag and separate runbook approve cross-repo writes.

cross_project.notes: Shadow SSWS nodes are listed in data/z_pc_root_projects.json. Full Z-SSWS Auto Boot and indicator refresh run only in the hub repo so member dev servers and git state are not disturbed.

z_arrbce.name: Z-ARRBCE — Auto Refresh + Regenerate Backup Core Engines
z_arrbce.purpose: Hub-only sequential refresh of freshness, system-status, guardian (light); optional dashboard indicators chain for bulk-load days.
z_arrbce.security_note: Complements Harisha UX and Vegeta guardian-tier awareness (Z-ALD → Z-Security); does not bypass enforcer, vault, or autonomous approvals.

monitoring.dashboard_growth_mode: Lens strip toggle Growth Calm/Normal stores zSanctuaryGrowthMode in localStorage; multiplies narrow-strip and Observe badge poll spacing (~2.5x when Calm).
monitoring.notes: Prefer read-only probes + report JSON over frequent writes to member trees. Escalate fixes to hub-only tasks first.

hub_autonomous_repair.notes: Member-project npm install, git reset, or deletes require human intent; use EAII launcher + Cursor, not silent hub scripts.
